name: Swarming
description:
Able to copy itself many times over when thrown until the air is filled with deadly blades, a swarming weapon turns a single weapon into a shower of devastation.

Activate 2 (concentrate)

Frequency once per hour

Effect You fling your weapon and it multiplies as it flies through the air, filling a . All creatures within the area take damage equal to double the weapon's number of damage dice, with a save.
